testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed

testcase.name: Add and Remove Any Script and Verify

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (202, 111). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) Build info: version: '4.14.1', revision: '03f8ede370' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [9c50e8fb55f7cd9d353cb319b0782098, clickElement {id=f.98DC18C3EF42964405F921F178E5B1EE.d.FA2B862506B873FA13094B6F263AADB8.e.114}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50385}, goog:processID: 24004, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50385/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (9c50e8fb55f7cd9d353cb319b0782098)] -> xpath: //input[@id='project-id']] Session ID: 9c50e8fb55f7cd9d353cb319b0782098

testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................skipped And User click the search box...............................................failed And User Search any "SWIGGY" Script.........................................skipped And User Mouse Over and Add a Script "SWIGGY"...............................skipped And User POP Up Message Appear Verify POP UP................................skipped And User Remove The "SWIGGY" Stock..........................................skipped

testcase.name: Payin - Withdraw Money from Navia
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Click The Withdraw button..........................................passed

testcase.name: Payin - Add Money to Navia via UPI
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Click Add Money....................................................passed And User enter money in amount to add.......................................passed And User Choose Pay Using UPI...............................................passed And User Enter UPI/ID/Mobile Number and click pay now.......................passed

testcase.name: User Check The Mutual Fund - UPI Payment - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User MouseOver Dashboard and Click Mutual Funds.........................passed And User Click Explore......................................................passed And User Search "Navi Flexi Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth" in Serach Box and enter.passed And User Click One Time , enter amount "100" and click pay now..............passed And User Click enter UPI ID "6374837965@ptsbi" and Click Pay Via UPI........passed

testcase.name: Verify Charts - Nifty 50 Candle View
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Click the Watch List...............................................passed And User Select scrip "S&P BSE SENSEX"......................................passed And User Click Watch List Again.............................................passed And User mouse over the scrip "Nifty 50"....................................passed And User Click the Candles Icon.............................................passed And User Choose Candle "candle".............................................passed And User Check the one Minute and one Day Chart.............................passed

testcase.name: Verify Charts - SENSEX Candle View
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Click the Watch List...............................................passed And User Select scrip "S&P BSE SENSEX"......................................passed And User mouse over the scrip "SENSEX"......................................passed And User Click the Candles Icon.............................................passed And User Choose Candle "candle".............................................passed And User Check the one Minute and one Day Chart.............................passed

testcase.name: Verify Charts - ICICIBANK and HDFCBANK F&O
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User Select The "ICICIBANK" Stock or F&O to Chart.......................passed And User Select The "HDFCBANK" Stock or F&O to Chart........................passed
